response.text:

rationale: Emergency inbound acceptance overrides conservative policy; 0.003125 kWh marginal offer poses no risk and extends autonomy in critical islanded state.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded critical state: SoC 11.5% with ~14 min autonomy at current load. All neighbors rejecting transfers; cluster under sustained stress. Suspend all outbound sharing. Accept only emergency inbound offers from any peer. Load shedding recommended if available..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
